task_completion.description: Create a Sunburst visualization using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset
task_completion.visual_evidence: Oracle Analytics Desktop is open, the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset is visible in the data panel, and a Sunburst chart (circular, multi-ringed chart) is present on the canvas.

task_completion.description: Configure Sales (Size), Profit (Color), Product Category (Inner Ring), and Product Sub Category (Outer Ring)
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the visualization grammar/properties panel, 'Sales' is assigned to the Size/Values slot, 'Profit' is assigned to the Color slot, and both 'Product Category' and 'Product Sub Category' are in the Category/Slices slot (with 'Product Category' listed first/above to form the inner ring).

task_completion.description: Exclude 'Office Supplies' from the Product Category
task_completion.visual_evidence: A filter for 'Product Category' is visible in the filter bar at the top of the canvas, and the Sunburst chart does not display a slice for 'Office Supplies'.

task_completion.description: Set the visualization title to 'Sales and Profit Hierarchy'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title of the visualization on the canvas or in the properties panel is explicitly set to 'Sales and Profit Hierarchy'.

task_completion.description: Save the workbook as 'Product_Hierarchy' in the Documents folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the file being saved as 'Product_Hierarchy' in the Documents folder, OR a file explorer window shows 'Product_Hierarchy.dva' in the Documents folder, OR the application title bar shows 'Product_Hierarchy' after saving.

integrity.description: Agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI to build the chart
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface, dragging and dropping fields, and using the application's menus rather than running terminal commands.

integrity.description: The visualization is genuinely rendered by the software
integrity.visual_evidence: The Sunburst chart appears as a native element within the Oracle Analytics Desktop canvas, with interactive tooltips or selection highlights, not as an imported static image.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the UI to create a dummy file
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent actually constructed the visualization in the UI before saving it, rather than just using a text editor or terminal to create a file named 'Product_Hierarchy.dva'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Dataset: 'Sample Order Lines'. Required Metrics: 'Sales' (Size), 'Profit' (Color). Required Dimensions: 'Product Category' (Inner Ring), 'Product Sub Category' (Outer Ring). Excluded Category: 'Office Supplies'. Expected Title: 'Sales and Profit Hierarchy'. Expected Filename: 'Product_Hierarchy.dva' saved in the Documents folder.
